ddls:
CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "published_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the article was published */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of tags associated with the article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the article */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the article */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of views the article has received */,
  "content" TEXT /* Full text of the article */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source where the article was published */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., user, moderator, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "profile_bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the user */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "background_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's background picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "parent_tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent tag (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_tags" (
  "article_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article-tag association */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_tags_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_tags_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article the comment is on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the comment was last updated */,
  "reply_to_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment being replied to (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reactions" (
  "reaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reaction */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment the reaction is on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the reaction */,
  "reaction_type" TEXT /* Type of reaction (e.g., like, dislike) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the reaction was made */,
  "reaction_category" TEXT /* Category of reaction (e.g., likes, dislikes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reactions_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_follows" (
  "follow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follow relationship */,
  "follower_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is following */,
  "following_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being followed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the follow relationship was created */,
  "follow_type" TEXT /* Type of follow (e.g., mutual follow, one-way follow) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_follows_follower_id FOREIGN KEY ("follower_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_follows_following_id FOREIGN KEY ("following_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article the vote is on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the vote */,
  "vote_type" TEXT /* Type of vote (e.g., upvote, downvote) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the vote was made */,
  "vote_weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the vote (e.g., based on user reputation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_votes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_votes_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_bookmarks" (
  "bookmark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bookmark */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article the bookmark is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the bookmark */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the bookmark was created */,
  "folder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the folder the bookmark is in (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bookmark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_bookmarks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_bookmarks_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the preference was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the preference was last updated */,
  "preference_category" TEXT /* Category of preference (e.g., notification settings) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., view, comment, vote) */,
  "activity_data" TEXT /* Additional data related to the activity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the activity occurred */,
  "activity_category" TEXT /* Category of activity (e.g., engagement, contribution) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
